ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the song belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the song */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Sub-genre of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the feature belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0-1) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song (dB) */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (0-1) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song (BPM) */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, curator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "addition_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommends" (
  "recommend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song recommended */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation (0-1) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommends_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommends_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clustering" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song in the cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification" (
  "classify_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being classified */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the song is classified as */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the classification (0-1) */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date the classification was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classify_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moods" (
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mood */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song associated with the mood */,
  "mood_name" TEXT /* Name of the mood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moods_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song associated with the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lyric */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the lyric belongs to */,
  "lyric_text" TEXT /* Text of the lyric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
